question: How many customers are there?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM customers

question: List all products in the Electronics category.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT id, name, price, stock FROM products WHERE category = 'Electronics'

question: What is the most expensive product?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which customers are from New York?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT name, email FROM customers WHERE city = 'New York'

question: How many orders has each customer placed?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC

question: What is the total revenue generated?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(p.price * o.quantity) AS total_revenue FROM orders o JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id

question: Which customer placed the most orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1

question: List all products that have never been ordered.
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name FROM products p LEFT JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id WHERE o.id IS NULL

question: What is the average product price per category?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT category, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY avg_price DESC

question: Which products were ordered by customers from Chicago?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.name FROM products p JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.city = 'Chicago'
